summary: Iteration 48: Full system audit completed. ALL 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Standalone booking page /termin working with trust signals, date picker, form. Landing page has all 10 section IDs. Footer has all legal links + NEW /termin booking link. Admin login 2-step flow works. Legal pages render correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test contact, booking, and quote request entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified in iteration 48: 1) NEW admin endpoints all return 200: /api/admin/billing/overview, /api/admin/outbound/campaigns, /api/admin/monitoring/health, /api/admin/monitoring/workers, /api/admin/memory/stats, /api/admin/oracle/snapshot, /api/admin/oracle/contact/{email}. 2) Public endpoints working: /api/health, /api/contact, /api/booking, /api/chat/message, /api/quote/request. 3) Worker system active via /api/admin/workers/status. 4) Standalone booking page at /termin renders with trust signals, date picker, form, footer. 5) Landing page has all 10 section IDs: #loesungen, #use-cases, #app-dev, #integrationen, #preise, #ki-seo, #services, #trust, #faq, #kontakt. 6) Footer has all legal links + NEW /termin booking link. 7) Admin login 2-step flow works. 8) Rate limiting active (SlowAPI 200/min). 9) Legal pages render correctly.

BACKEND_Public_Booking.details: POST /api/booking works (400 if slot taken = API working)

BACKEND_NEW_BillingOverview.details: GET /api/admin/billing/overview returns 200 with summary, revenue, recent_quotes, recent_invoices

BACKEND_NEW_OracleContact.details: GET /api/admin/oracle/contact/{email} returns 200 with contact oracle data

FRONTEND_BookingPage_Termin.details: Standalone booking page at /termin renders with title 'Book Strategy Call', trust signals (GDPR, Confidential, Response 2h, No hidden costs), date picker, 'What to expect' section, footer with legal links

FRONTEND_Footer_Links.details: All footer links found: Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB, KI-Hinweise, and NEW /termin booking link ('Termin buchen')

FRONTEND_AdminLogin.details: 2-step login flow works: email → Weiter → password → Anmelden → redirects to /admin dashboard

FRONTEND_LegalPage_Impressum.details: Impressum page renders with company info, addresses (NL/DE), contact, Handelsregister (KvK, BTW-ID)
